name: lookup
title: Symbol Lookup
description: Look up a symbol in a Convex account environment. Returns existence, value (with optional path navigation), and metadata.

symbol.description: Symbol name to look up at specified address (e.g. 'user-database')

getPath.description: Optional path to navigate into the value (e.g. '[:users 7 :name]') in CVX format

exists.description: Whether the symbol exists in the account environment

value.description: The value at the symbol (using getIn with the path if provided) in CVX format

meta.description: The metadata on the symbol (can be null) in CVX format
